description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form factor and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a colorful, abstract wallpaper and a dual front-facing camera cutout in the top left corner. The back is finished in a matte blue color and prominently displays the word 'HONOR' in large, vertical letters, along with a rectangular camera module housing multiple lenses and sensors in the top left. The sides are slim, with visible buttons on the right edge for power and volume control. The device appears to be constructed primarily from glass and metal, with a smooth, glossy finish on the front and a matte texture on the back. This phone is typical of high-end urban mobile devices, designed for portability, communication, and multimedia use.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large display, dual front cameras, and a matte blue back featuring the 'HONOR' logo and a multi-lens camera module.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, colorful display with a dual front-facing camera cutout in the top left corner.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the slim profile and the slight protrusion of the rear camera module.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the matte blue finish, large 'HONOR' logo, and rectangular multi-lens camera module in the top left.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the slim edge and the presence of physical buttons for power and volume control.
attribute_brand_logo: Large 'HONOR' text logo vertically oriented on the back, in a lighter shade of blue contrasting with the matte blue surface.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a vibrant, abstract wallpaper with smooth gradients of blue, purple, and pink; no icons, widgets, or notifications are visible.
attribute_camera_placement: Dual front-facing cameras in a pill-shaped cutout at the top left of the display; a rectangular rear camera module with multiple lenses and sensors is located in the top left corner of the back.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge, likely including a power button and a volume rocker; no buttons are visible on the front or left edge.
